openFindings.title: Packet completion surfaces overstate closure while checklist work remains open
openFindings.description: The packet is marked complete and the continuity block reports 100% completion even though the checklist still contains unresolved P1/P2 verification work.

openFindings.title: Renumbered packet still cites a dead sibling research path
openFindings.description: The packet still points at `../research/research.md`, but the preserved research lives under the root `research/010-search-and-routing-tuning-pt-02/` tree after migration.

openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still carries the obsolete 010 phase slug
openFindings.description: The migrated packet path is `.../001-search-and-routing-tuning/...`, but `parentChain` still records `010-search-and-routing-tuning`, so lineage metadata no longer matches the packet's real location.

openFindings.title: Packet evidence anchors still point at pre-growth code line ranges
openFindings.description: The packet docs and checklist still cite `content-router.ts:369-378`, `868-877`, and `904-920`, but the implemented seam now lives at later lines, so the packet's own evidence no longer lands on the claimed code.

openFindings.title: Continuity metadata hides the packet's remaining verification follow-up
openFindings.description: The continuity block declares `completion_pct: 100`, `blockers: []`, and no open questions even though the packet still records unresolved evidence work and a broader benchmark follow-up.

openFindings.title: Decision record frontmatter still says planned after the packet completed
openFindings.description: The ADR body reflects a shipped decision, but the frontmatter status remains `planned`, leaving the packet's doc state internally inconsistent.
